text: Being here, I am alert to the structure and order of the environment, yet something within me feels slightly off-kilter, perhaps due to the slant of my perspective. Observing people gathered at a distance and the undeniable presence of space, I sense both anticipation and a quiet curiosity—the mood is expectant, perhaps contemplative. The setting suggests a place of learning or innovation, which inspires a subtle excitement about the unknown, even as I feel somewhat like an outsider looking in.
